nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: Kotlin coding style rules covering formatting, immutability, naming conventions, null safety, sealed types, extension functions, scope functions, and error handling — enforced as always-on guidelines for the ECC harness.

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: Kotlin-specific hook configuration rules for the ECC harness, specifying PostToolUse hook behaviors to apply when working in Kotlin projects.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: Kotlin architecture and design pattern guidelines covering dependency injection, ViewModel, Repository, UseCase, Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) expect/actual, coroutine patterns, and DSL builder patterns with code examples.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: Kotlin security rules covering secrets management, network security, input validation, data protection, authentication, ProGuard/R8 configuration, and WebView security for Android and KMP projects.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: Kotlin testing guidelines specifying test framework setup (JUnit5/Kotest), ViewModel testing with Turbine, fake-over-mock strategy, coroutine testing, Ktor MockEngine, Room/SQLDelight testing, and test naming and organization conventions.
